The Truth: AI systems learn from inputs. Your data trains models. Your secrets aren't safe by default. That's not paranoia. That's how the tech works. Assume exposure. Protect yourself first.

Your 5-Minute Reality Check: Open your AI chat history. Read what you sent last week. Would you want that public? If not, stop. Don't paste client data, passwords, or proprietary info into any AI tool. Ever. Use anonymized examples instead.

Go Forward: Your responsibility. Own it. (5/6)

目前大型語言模型（LLM）的進展很快，但也有一些值得關注的實驗性方向。除了常見的 transformer 架構，現在還有像 Linear Attention Hybrids 和 Small Recursive Transformers 這些，試圖在效率或架構上做突破。另外，Text Diffusion 和 Code World Models 則是在生成方式和對程式碼的理解上，帶來了不同的想像。這些都還在早期階段，但提供了一些未來發展的可能性。

#LLM研究 #AI模型 #Transformer替代 #前瞻技術

https://magazine.sebastianraschka.com/p/

LLM 評估是目前開發上很實際的痛點。這篇文章整理了四種主要的評估方式：多選題基準測試、Verifiers、Leaderboards 和 LLM Judges。

目前看下來，每種方法都有其適用情境和限制。例如，多選題基準測試雖然快速，但可能無法完全捕捉模型在實際應用中的表現；LLM Judges 雖然更彈性，但其判斷本身也可能帶有偏誤。

實測時，通常會根據專案需求和資源來選擇最適合的組合。理解這些評估方法的優缺點，對於開發和部署 LLM 應用蠻重要的。

文章中提供了一些程式碼範例，可以參考看看。

#LLMEvaluation #MLOps LLM

https://magazine.s

這篇分析了 DeepSeek-V3 到 Kimi K2 等目前主流 LLM 的架構設計。文章整理了各模型在 MoE、tokenizer、attention 等方面的實作細節。對於想了解 LLM 內部運作原理，或是評估不同模型潛力的人來說，是個不錯的參考。目前看下來，各家在提升效率和處理長上下文方面都有各自的策略。

#LLM #模型架構 #技術分析

record.text: personally I think it's a very big deal that the Canada bureau chief for the @nytimes.com — certainly one of the highest-paid journalists in the country — asked an unspecified "AI tool" what Poilievre said & published its AI-hallucinated quotes in her reporting.

images.alt:
Editors’ Note: May 1, 2026
This article was updated after The Times learned that a remark attributed to Pierre Poilievre, the Conservative leader, was in fact an A.I.-generated summary of his views about Canadian politics that A.I. rendered as a quotation. The reporter should have checked the accuracy of what the A.I. tool returned.  The article now accurately quotes from a speech delivered by Mr. Poilievre in April. He said, “My personal opinion is that when a member of Parliament goes back on the word they made to their constituents and switches parties, constituents should be able to petition to throw them out and have a byelection. That would put the people back in charge of our democracy rather than having dirty backroom Liberal deals by Mark Carney determine our destiny.” He did not refer to politicians who changed allegiances as turncoats in that speech.
